title: Villagers in Inventory
description: Pick up villagers instantly, Place villagers anywhere.
body:
### **Features**
Pick up villagers instantly
Place villagers anywhere
Keeps professions and trades

### **Controls**
Sneak + Right Click → Pick up villager
Right Click → Place villager

### **Requirements**
Fabric Loader
Fabric API

_Multiplayer compatible
Lightweight and simple
Made for Fabric 26.1.2_

![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd96a80395310caff3f91cabd58d11b78863879c.png)
